---
title: "Used Software"
---

## Codes developed at DPCATCH ##



## Other Codes ##



### Geemoo ###
<https://arxiv.org/abs/2501.10277>


### Erebor ###

<https://arxiv.org/abs/2405.04690> 


### Glass ###

<https://arxiv.org/abs/2301.03673>


### Stefan’s code ###
<https://arxiv.org/pdf/2403.15318>
 
<https://github.com/stefanstrub/GlobalGB>

Author: Stefan Strub
